perception.visual: orange and yellow tongues rising and falling, no fixed shape, light thrown in all directions
perception.auditory: low crackling, occasional pop — rhythmic but unpredictable
perception.olfactory: sharp, woody smoke — catches at the back of the throat
perception.thermal: intense warmth from a distance, face hot before body moves closer

interpretation.meaning: alive but not living — it moves, it breathes, it responds, but it is not safe; proximity must be earned
